IntegrationAuditKeyword.description: Keyword search within audit entries (alternative mode to org-wide or entity-scoped listing).
IntegrationAuditKeyword.name: q

IntegrationAuditSince.description: RFC3339 timestamp lower bound (defaults to 24 hours ago when omitted).
IntegrationAuditSince.name: since

IntegrationAuditTargetID.description: Entity identifier for scoped audit fetch; must be sent together with `target_kind`.
IntegrationAuditTargetID.name: target_id

IntegrationAuditTargetKind.description: Entity kind for scoped audit fetch; must be sent together with `target_id`.
IntegrationAuditTargetKind.name: target_kind

IntegrationsIdsCSV.description: Comma-separated UUIDs restricting the result set (accounts, bindings, links, enrollments, or downlinks depending on the route).
IntegrationsIdsCSV.name: ids

IntegrationsNameQuery.description: Filter by name; ignored when `q` is set (the handler prefers `q`).
IntegrationsNameQuery.name: name

IntegrationsSearchQuery.description: Free-text name search (preferred over `name` when both are provided).
IntegrationsSearchQuery.name: q

PendingSubsumeStatus.description: Subsume queue status filter. Omit to return only `pending` rows; use empty string or `all` for every status; otherwise filter by the given status string.
PendingSubsumeStatus.name: status

CursorPaginationMeta.description: Cursor (keyset) pagination metadata for append-only or time-ordered feeds.

count.description: Number of rows returned in this page (not total across the feed).

has_more.description: True when another page exists; use meta.next_cursor as the cursor query param.

items_per_page.description: Requested page size (limit query param after clamping).

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when has_more is false.

DeviceKeyAlgorithm.description: Key algorithm for MQTT device client certificate CSR generation.

failure_count.description: Replay intent retry counter (display-only; circuit breaker uses lineage counter).

materialization_failure_count.description: Consecutive permanent materialization failures; present when > 0.

materialization_last_error.description: Normalized last permanent materialization error; present when set.

IntegrationAccountListItem.description: Integration account summary row in list responses.

IntegrationAccountPublic.description: Integration account returned in GET/PATCH .../integrations/accounts responses (masked auth).

IssueDeviceMQTTCertificateData.description: PEM material returned once at issuance; the private key is not stored server-side.

IssueDeviceMQTTCertificateRequest.description: Optional body; omit or send an empty object to use the default algorithm (rsa).

OTADetailMeta.description: Empty object; present for envelope consistency on OTA detail GETs.

OrganizationsPropertiesDocument.description: Org properties keyed by org_prop_type (e.g. type, email, website_link, email_config, sms_config, project_policy, custom). Shapes mirror the legacy platform org-props envelope; optional filters still scope which rows hydrate keys. When `page`/`limit` are used, only keys for property rows on that page are present (rows ordered by `prop`).

PaginatedCollectionResponse.description: Paginated list envelope ({ ok, data, meta }) for project collection GETs

PaginationMeta.description: Pagination metadata for list endpoints (snake_case keys).

project_id.description: project_id is immutable and is rejected when supplied.

yaml_spec.description: Form definition YAML (normalized to JSON in DB).
New form version from YAML (name must match existing form).

QueryScriptRequest.description: QueryScript v2 JSON/YAML body. Kept intentionally loose while compiler contract stabilizes.

resumed.description: True when the lineage was paused by materialization failure and is now active.

staged_row_count.description: Count of staged rows in TSDB at reset time; omitted when zero.

status.description: Lineage status after reset (active when resumed).

SuccessEnvelope.description:
Preferred shape for successful JSON responses is `{ ok, data, meta }` with list metadata
(e.g. pagination totals) in top-level `meta`, not nested under `data`.

data.description: Response payload; may be null for no-content successes.

meta.description: Top-level metadata (e.g. pagination); null when unused.

workflow_def_id.description: Stable ticket_workflow_defs id; server uses the active version.

TicketPatchRequest.description: At least one property should be set (enforced by the API).

workflow.description: Ticket workflow definition as JSON (persisted in ticket_workflow_def_versions.spec).
New workflow version JSON (name must match existing ticket_workflow_defs row).

info.description:
Generation-ready starter contract for ilyama's HTTP API.
This is intentionally scoped to stable routes already mounted in services/apis
so frontend clients can begin integrating against the rewrite immediately.
info.title: ilyama Core API

Generates a device key pair and CSR, signs a broker-compatible client certificate via the

already linked to the device (HTTP 409).

Execute QueryScript against project TSDB data

post.description:
Executes QueryScript with no row cap and streams the full result until the TSDB cursor is exhausted.
The response uses `application/vnd.apache.arrow.stream` with `Content-Encoding: zstd`. Many clients
(curl, wget, typical Go/Java/TypeScript HTTP stacks) return compressed bytes; decompress before parsing Arrow IPC.
post.summary: Export QueryScript results as a zstd-compressed Arrow IPC stream

get.description: Defaults to connected=true. Uses the same device list filters as fleet-scoped device reads where applicable.

parameters.description: Page number (1-based). If omitted and `offset` is set, page is derived as offset/limit + 1.
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Legacy offset; used only when `page` is omitted.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Comma-separated ticket UUIDs; list is restricted to these ids (invalid tokens return 400).
parameters.name: ids

parameters.description: Substring match on title (ignored if fewer than 3 characters, same pattern as device name search).
parameters.name: title_search

parameters.description: When set (with optional tag_value), only tickets having at least one tag with this kind are returned.
parameters.name: tag_kind

parameters.description: Optional; when set with tag_kind, tag value must match exactly.
parameters.name: tag_value

parameters.description: Comma-separated allowlisted field names for each item. Base ticket keys (e.g. id, title, system_class) plus expansions `tags` (array) and `state_label` (object). Unknown names return 400. When omitted, each item is the full ticket object.
parameters.name: fields

400.description: Invalid query (e.g. unknown `fields` token or invalid filter UUID)

patch.summary: Patch ticket fields (title, body, metadata merge)
